name: Sweet Screw Factory
description: Sweet Screw Factory is a physics-based puzzle game where you unscrew colorful candy bolts to drop and guide candy blocks into matching collection jars! Remove screws in the right order to control how platforms fall, pivot, and slide. 120 levels across 6 candy factory worlds with locked screws, chain reactions, trampolines, portals, and boss puzzles. Easy, Medium & Hard difficulty with full progress saving!
instructions: Tap candy screws to remove them and let physics do the rest Guide falling candy blocks into matching colored jars to win
